name: iris-reveal
title: Iris Reveal
description: A circle clip-path opens from an authored origin revealing state B over state A in one confident pass, then holds on B. Classic register dims and desaturates the before state so the after state lands in full color; a thin accent rim rides the iris edge. Callers fill the named before/after slot panels; token-styled defaults render when a slot is left empty.
evidence: Wave K2: the X expert demand study names the iris/circular reveal as a canonical scene transition; before-after-wipe donates the slot convention

variables.label: Iris origin X
variables.description: Horizontal iris origin as a percent of the frame width.

variables.label: Iris origin Y
variables.description: Vertical iris origin as a percent of the frame height.

variables.label: Open start
variables.description: Seconds after mount start when the iris begins opening.

variables.label: Register
variables.description: Color dims and desaturates the before state so the after state lands in full color. Plain leaves both untouched.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Iris rim ring and default after art tint.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Outgoing transition. None holds the final revealed frame.
